title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 409.566 - Unlawful practices, offeree may bring suit, damages, attorney fees
text:
409.566.  Unlawful practices, offeree may bring suit, damages, attorney fees. — Any offeree whose equity securities are the subject of a takeover bid and who has been injured by any violation of sections 409.500 to 409.566 may bring an action in his or her own name to enjoin such unlawful act or practice and to recover actual damages together with reasonable attorney fees in the event the offeree is successful.
(L. 1986 H.B. 1667)
